description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JavaScript that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has five jobs: benchmark, build, test, lint, and pack. Each job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and windows-latest environments, except lint and pack which run only on ubuntu-latest. For each job, check out the repository, set up JavaScript environment using a custom action, and then run yarn commands to benchmark, build, test, lint, or pack the JavaScript code in the javascript directory.
